items.title: Live updates: Bitcoin in volatile trading above $63,000, DOGE unchanged
items.summary: Crypto firmed across the board on the largest listing in history, but the token most tied to Elon Musk traded right in line with the market.
items.titleZh: 实时更新：比特币在63000美元以上波动交易，DOGE不变
items.summaryZh: 加密货币在历史上规模最大的上市中全面走强，但与埃隆·马斯克关系最密切的代币交易与市场走势一致。

items.title: 'I was employee number one': SpaceX co-founder reacts to firm's market debut
items.summary: The BBC's Michelle Fleury spoke to Tom Mueller, who was one of the company's founders alongside Elon Musk in 2002.
items.titleZh: “我是第一号员工”：SpaceX联合创始人对公司首次上市做出反应
items.summaryZh: 英国广播公司的Michelle Fleury采访了Tom Mueller，他是该公司的创始人之一，与埃隆·马斯克一起于2002年创立。

items.title: SpaceX's crypto-traded IPO was sharply falling. It now points upward to a $2.4 trillion valuation
items.summary: The SPCX perpetual on Hyperliquid has bounced from this week’s lows, while Bloomberg says other shadow markets now imply a first-day gain of more than 35%.
items.titleZh: SpaceX的加密货币交易IPO大幅下跌。现在，它的估值高达2.4万亿美元
items.summaryZh: 超级液体上的SPCX指数已经从本周的低点反弹，而彭博社表示，其他影子市场现在意味着首日涨幅超过35%。

items.title: ChatGPT hits a billion monthly app users despite souring public AI sentiment
items.summary: ChatGPT reached a billion monthly users in May despite growing unease over its ethical and environmental impacts.
items.titleZh: 尽管公众的人工智能情绪恶化，但ChatGPT每月仍有10亿应用用户
items.summaryZh: 尽管人们对ChatGPT的道德和环境影响越来越不安，但它在5月份的月用户数达到了10亿。

items.title: CNBC Daily Open: The buyers are back ahead of SpaceX IPO
items.summary: SpaceX will start trading on the Nasdaq today after raising $75 billion in its record-breaking IPO, as Wall Street's rally resumes on Iran peace hopes.
items.titleZh: CNBC Daily Open：买家在SpaceX IPO之前回归
items.summaryZh: 随着华尔街对伊朗和平希望的复苏，SpaceX在创纪录的首次公开募股中筹集了750亿美元后，将于今天开始在纳斯达克交易。

items.title: How to trade the SpaceX IPO in Asia's locked-out markets
items.summary: With no direct access to the IPO, traders from Seoul to Shanghai are piling into companies along the space supply chain, industry-themed ETFs and Nasdaq 100 Index-tracking funds in hopes of capturing gains
items.titleZh: 如何在亚洲的封闭市场交易SpaceX的首次公开募股
items.summaryZh: 由于无法直接参与IPO，从首尔到上海的交易员纷纷涌入太空供应链沿线的公司、行业主题ETF和纳斯达克100指数跟踪基金，希望获得收益

items.title: SpaceX's IPO brings Elon Musk closer to becoming the world's first trillionaire
items.summary: Elon Musk, already the world's richest man, is set to become a lot richer thanks to SpaceX's blockbuster IPO.
items.titleZh: SpaceX的首次公开募股使埃隆·马斯克更接近成为世界上第一位亿万富翁
items.summaryZh: 埃隆·马斯克（Elon Musk）已经是世界上最富有的人，得益于SpaceX的重磅IPO，他将变得更加富有。

items.title: Apple’s Camera Chief Thinks AI Can Give You Superpowers
items.summary: The generative features in iOS 27’s new Photos app will add fake pixels to some of your shots, but Apple’s Jon McCormack says the company isn’t using AI “for the sake of AI.”
items.titleZh: 苹果相机主管认为人工智能可以给你超级能力
items.summaryZh: iOS 27的新照片应用程序中的生成功能将为你的一些照片添加虚假像素，但苹果的Jon McCormack表示，该公司并不是“为了人工智能”而使用人工智能
